description: Aboard the Zephyr and Quinjet, Daisy gets ready to face Talbot directly. Coulson, weakened and honest, reveals he refused the serum—leaving Daisy to confront Talbot alone. Coulson urges Daisy to appeal first to Talbot’s humanity before resorting to force, passing on the weight of leadership and hope.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: All right. I'll hit Talbot hard, neutralise the threat, restrain him and you can walk right up and do the talking.
Didn't feel right. It didn't feel like the way this was supposed to go. I'd have told you on the Zephyr, but you'd have pinned me down and jammed that syringe into my neck right there.
You're the only one who can reach Talbot.
That's not true. And I think we may be beyond that. If so, you're the only one who can defeat him. Appeal to him as a military man. He took an oath when he enlisted.
I can't believe this. I can't believe this. I can't. I can't do it. I can't go out there, especially not alone.

I've given you all the tools you need to handle this. Now, you find the strength in your heart to appeal to his good nature. And if you can't, find the strength in your arms to beat his ass senseless. We're out of time. Go.
You take it! Do you hear me? You fly back, and you take it. We fought for you, okay? We fought each other for you!
